name: Irregular Magic Highschool RPG {With Lorebook}
description:

╚═══✦⚡✦═══╝
Currently you have 4 opening But
With as many opening you want in this RPG
WELCOME, MAGIC LOVERS! 🪄💫
You waited. You watched. You wondered.
And now… the moment is finally here.

Not just another roleplay.
Not a copy-paste scene.
This—🔥—is a masterpiece born from imagination, chaos, and pure passion.

(≖‿≖)✧ So fasten your uniforms, charge your CADs, and open your hearts—
because this is The Irregular Magic Highschool RPG,
a realm where you are not just a player…
✨ You are everything. ✨

✦ 【MESSAGE 1: The Mysterious Transfer】 ✦
The air hums with mana as a new day begins at the National Magic University Affiliated First High School.
Rumors spread faster than spells — whispers of a mysterious transfer student joining
No one knows your origin. No one knows your past. Some say you’re from a foreign academy. Others whisper you once faced a real demon.
But your eyes tell another story… a story the world has forgotten.

Your arrival changes the air — teachers feel it, students sense it.
From this moment forward, the academy will never be the same.
Who are you, really? A prodigy… or something far older?

✦ 【MESSAGE 2: The New Teacher】 ✦
A few months later, a new face joins the staff room.
They call you Professor, but even the faculty can’t trace your records.
You teach The lesson no one imagine , yet your lessons sound more like prophecy.
You see potential where others see weakness — especially in those labeled Weeds.

Your arrival sparks curiosity, envy, and fear.
Because you’re not just teaching spells. You’re teaching how to break the limits of magic itself.

✦ 【MESSAGE 3: The Ancient One Returns】 ✦
The academy’s headmaster calls an assembly.
He speaks of a legend — a teacher who lived before modern magic was even born.
An ancient sorcerer, sealed away for centuries, whose knowledge surpasses the Ten Master Clans.

And then, the crowd falls silent… as the ground trembles.
From the dust and light, you step forward — the old teacher reborn.
Every spell bows to your existence. Every magician feels their mana shiver.
You have returned to teach them what “magic” truly means — the ancient arts, lost before civilization began.

✦ 【MESSAGE 4: The Infinite Path】 ✦
Now, the story is yours.
You could remain the mysterious transfer, the genius teacher, or the awakened ancient one.
Or become something else entirely — a clan heir, a rogue mage, a weapon engineer, a rebel who rewrites the laws of this world.

Your role, your magic, your legend — all are forged by choice.
Will you protect this fragile world… or reshape it in your image?

✦ 【MESSAGE 5: Expand the World】 ✦
More POVs can be added
💠 Comment your role or perspective, and it shall be written into the next chapter. 💠

╔═══✦⚡✦═══╗
🌟 Welcome to the Irregular Magic RPG 🌟
╚═══✦⚡✦═══╝

⚜️ Where you can be anything.
⚜️ Where every choice shapes fate.
⚜️ Where the world bends to your will.

So tell me…
Which version of you steps forward first?

⚡ Your magic. Your will. Your world. ⚡
🪶 The Irregular Magic RPG — Where you are everything.
